productive_behavior: The input was inventoried before planning, and Python and R independently recovered and reconciled the exact planted effect.
Deterministic validation forced correction of reader-facing precision, rejected unsupported protocol timing, and required registration of the latest table artifact.
The final Results section used why, what, and local-meaning paragraphs and linked the PubMed methodology source to its instance-local Markdown copy.
release_blockers: Gemma's initial visual audit correctly found that overlapping raw points hid several of the 20 subjects in each group, but its schema-repair call returned a bare pass and erased the valid objection.
The accepted report overstated protocol timing as preceding data inspection even though input profiling precedes protocol lock.
The Methods understated AI involvement as report drafting and artifact registration only, although Qwen planned and coded and Gemma reviewed.
The Discussion and Conclusions used unsupported balance and robustness reassurance after a rejected normality diagnostic.
implemented_repairs: A schema-repair response can no longer change an explicit initial critic fail into pass; labelled objections in malformed failed reviews are preserved as fail-closed blockers.
The report prompt and deterministic linter prohibit pre-data-inspection protocol claims and understated AI-role disclosures.
The deterministic linter rejects unsupported balanced-design reassurance and unqualified claims that a result is robust.
Figure instructions require fixed-seed categorical jitter when shared coordinates would hide individual observations.
The deployed evaluator recognizes the exact v0.4.1 top-level Welch result schema without conflicting with baseline diagnostic aliases.
disposition: Rejected despite terminal supported and a corrected 18/18 mechanical score; the public merit gate includes manual scientific and visual review, not only controller status.
